content:
# Recommendations ‚Äî next plan iter (iter-016)

## HIGH ‚Äî sync_leanok tooling defect (recurring, user-side fix)
- `sync_leanok` has now stripped verified-axiom-clean proof-block `\leanok` from
  `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex` for **2 consecutive iters** (iter-014 removed 22/added 1; iter-015
  removed 19/added 0). Both times review `lean_verify`-restored ~19‚Äì21 genuinely closed markers. The
  whole module builds green and each restored decl is axiom-clean, so the per-decl strip is a sync defect
  (likely heartbeat/timeout during the per-decl `lake build`/analysis on this large slow file), NOT a real
  regression. **Action: this is outside agent control ‚Äî surfaced in TO_USER for the user to fix the sync
  (e.g. raise the per-decl build budget for this chapter or skip re-stripping already-`\leanok` axiom-clean
  decls).** Until fixed, every review burns effort re-restoring; the DAG/dashboard under-reports SGR
  between the sync and review phases.

## HIGH ‚Äî close ‚òÖ `tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor_sheaf` (the assoc-chain crux, gates B4/B5)
- Mechanism is FOUND and the prefix COMPILES. Next prover: keep the current prefix; from the
  post-`erw [Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc]` goal, apply cancel lemmas one `erw` at a time **in goal order**
  (inspect with NON-pp.all `lean_goal`), interleaving the big `simp only [hc, ‚Ä¶]` when a positional pass
  makes progress, until only the Œ±-naturality step remains; then `erw [MonoidalCategory.associator_naturality]`
  + counit `erw [Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc]` pairs + `rfl`.
- **DO NOT** re-use the reflexive default comp-bridge (`fun f g => rfl` keyed to the ambient/inferInstance
  head) ‚Äî it is a no-op. Use the explicit `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.instCategory (X := X)` bridge,
  placed INSIDE the big `simp only`.
- **DO NOT** use unbounded `repeat erw` / `repeat (first | erw ‚Ä¶)` ‚Äî it hits the 200000-heartbeat `whnf`
  timeout. **DO NOT** raise `maxHeartbeats` (project rule).
- Per the iter-015 plan's hard-stop: if a real push cannot pin the bounded ordered sequence, iter-016
  escalates to the user (no further non-user variants). Closing ‚òÖ auto-cleans B4 and B5 to axiom-clean.

## MEDIUM ‚Äî land B6 `tensorPowAdd_assoc` (bankable, independent of ‚òÖ)
- Diamond-free pentagon induction; base reduced iter-014 (canonical unit-triangle coherence), succ ‚Üí
  `MonoidalCategory.pentagon`. Closable regardless of ‚òÖ ‚Äî schedule it in the same lane so progress banks
  even if ‚òÖ stalls. If the succ case hits the comp diamond, reuse the explicit-`instCategory` `hc` +
  bounded-`erw` recipe (NOT the reflexive bridge).

## MEDIUM ‚Äî stale `.lean` comments (review can't edit `.lean`; next prover/refactor to fix)
- `RelativeSpec.lean:701‚Äì709` ‚Äî docstring on `functor` claims `functor`/`structureMorphism` bodies are
  `sorry`; both are now concrete (`functor := fun ùíú => Over.mk (RelativeSpec.structureMorphism ùíú)`;
  `structureMorphism := .toBase`). File is axiom-clean throughout. Update/remove the docstring.
- `SectionGradedRing.lean:3009‚Äì3013` ‚Äî comment says the blueprint claims "Mac Lane coherence ‚Ä¶ discharges
  the hexagon" for `lem:tensorPowAdd_comm` and is wrong. The blueprint proof (tex 1342‚Äì1368) has SINCE
  been corrected (it now states Mac Lane coherence does NOT close the step + requires invertibility), so
  the comment's reference is stale. Tighten the comment to drop the obsolete blueprint reference.

## Blocked ‚Äî DO NOT re-assign
- comm chain (`tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible` 2960, `tensorPowAdd_comm` 2975,
  `sectionsMul_mul_comm` 3017): invertibility-gated FUTURE, NO consumer (`GCommSemiring` unbuilt). Signature
  correctly `[IsInvertible L]`. Not in the active cone ‚Äî do not dispatch.
- œá leg (`QuotScheme.lean` 123/161/198/225: `hilbertPolynomial`, `QuotFunctor`, `Grassmannian`,
  `Grassmannian.representable`): œá-semantic, DEFERRED to the cohomology engine at merge. Honest scaffolds.
  Do not re-probe.

## Reusable proof patterns discovered
- **Comp-instance-diamond bridge (CORRECTED).** When a goal mixes `X.Modules`-native `‚â´` with
  `LocalizedMonoidal`-comp factors: `have hc : @CategoryStruct.comp X.Modules
  (AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.instCategory (X := X)).toCategoryStruct ‚Ä¶ = @CategoryStruct.comp
  (LocalizedMonoidal ‚Ä¶) _ ‚Ä¶ := fun f g => rfl`, **inside** the big `simp only` (NOT a separate prior
  `simp only [hc]`, NOT keyed to `inferInstance`). Then `Category.assoc`+`tensorObj`+`tensorHom_def`+the
  whisker/Iso cancel lemmas fire on all non-diamond junctions; cross-diamond pairs cancel under `erw`.
- Cross-diamond `hom‚â´inv` cancellation: positional `rw`/`simp [Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc]` FAIL; `erw
  [Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc]` succeeds (one keyed defeq match). Bounded+ordered only ‚Äî never `repeat`.

## Subagent dispatch note
- Both highly-recommended review subagents dispatched this iter (prover touched SGR.lean). Reports:
  `.archon/task_results/lean-auditor-iter015.md`, `.archon/task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-iter015.md`.
